rationale: The page provides specific visual guidelines on the correct and incorrect ways to refer to Padma Award recipients. This relates to the constitutional prohibition of titles (Article 18) and the official protocol for civilian awards in India.
cleanedText:
WHAT IS NOT ALLOWED
* Padma Shri "ABCD"
YES! IT IS ALLOWED
* Padma Shri awardee "ABCD"
* "ABCD" (Padma Shri awarded by the President)
* "ABCD" (awarded Padma Shri by the President of India)
